_meta.purpose: Bulk x3 batch 4: Plyometrics, Power & Olympic-flavored explosive lifts (40 exercises)

exercises.name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand a foot away from a sturdy box with feet hip-width apart.
Swing the arms back, hinge briefly and jump explosively landing softly on top of the box with knees bent.
Step down (do not jump down) to start the next rep.

exercises.name: Step-Up to Jump
instructions: Place one foot on a low box, drive through it to step up explosively jumping into the air.
Land softly back on the same foot on the box.
Step down and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Depth Jump

restrictions.note: High-impact landing; avoid until full recovery.

instructions: Stand on top of a box of moderate height (30–60 cm).
Step off the box and as soon as you land, rebound immediately into a maximal vertical jump.
Land softly and reset before the next rep.

exercises.name: Box Squat Jump
instructions: Sit on a low box with feet flat and torso upright.
Drive through the feet jumping explosively up off the box.
Land softly, sit back down briefly and repeat.

exercises.name: Lateral Box Jump
instructions: Stand sideways next to a low box.
Bend the knees and jump laterally onto the box landing softly.
Step down to the opposite side and jump back across; alternate.

exercises.name: Seated Box Jump
instructions: Sit on a low box with feet flat and arms by the sides, stationary.
Without rocking, explode straight up jumping onto a target box in front.
Step down and reset between reps.

exercises.name: Broad Jump
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, swing the arms back and bend the knees.
Drive the arms forward and jump as far horizontally as possible.
Land softly with knees bent; reset before the next rep.

exercises.name: Tuck Jump
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart and arms at the sides.
Jump explosively bringing the knees toward the chest at the top.
Land softly bending the knees and immediately repeat.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Box Jump
instructions: Stand on one leg facing a low box.
Bend the knee and jump explosively up onto the box landing softly on the same leg.
Step down and complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Alternating Bounds
instructions: Run a few steps to gain rhythm.
Push off one leg and jump forward and slightly up landing on the opposite leg.
Continue alternating for the prescribed bounds focusing on horizontal distance.

exercises.name: Sandbag Clean

restrictions.note: Reduce load and emphasise the hip drive while symptoms persist.

instructions: Stand with the sandbag between the feet and grip the handles or the bag itself.
Hinge and explode up driving the hips forward, pulling the sandbag to the chest in a rack position.
Lower the sandbag to the floor under control and repeat.

exercises.name: Sandbag Front Squat
instructions: Hold a sandbag racked against the chest with both arms.
Squat down keeping the chest tall and elbows up.
Stand back up driving through the mid-foot.

exercises.name: Bear Hug Sandbag Carry
instructions: Pick up the sandbag and hug it tight against the chest, arms wrapped around it.
Walk forward with controlled steps for the prescribed distance or time.
Set the sandbag down with a hip hinge.

exercises.name: Sandbag Shoulder to Shoulder
instructions: Rack a sandbag on one shoulder with both hands supporting it.
Explosively press it overhead and lower to the opposite shoulder.
Alternate shoulders for the prescribed reps.

exercises.name: Sandbag Zercher Squat
instructions: Hold a sandbag in the crook of the elbows at chest height.
Squat down keeping the chest up and elbows tucked.
Stand back up driving through the mid-foot.

exercises.name: Sandbag Rotational Lunge
instructions: Hold a sandbag at chest height and step forward into a lunge.
Rotate the torso toward the front leg without losing balance.
Return to standing and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Sandbag Get-Up
instructions: Lie on the back hugging a sandbag to the chest.
Sit up, post a hand on the floor and stand up under control.
Reverse the sequence back to the floor; alternate sides.

exercises.name: Sandbag Drag
instructions: Loop a strap or grip the sandbag and walk backward dragging it on a smooth surface.
Maintain a slight forward lean and brace the core.
Continue for the prescribed distance or time.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Push-Up
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and set up in a high plank with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the chest to the floor in 2 seconds keeping the elbows tucked at ~45°.
Press back up to the start without sagging the hips.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Pull-Up
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and hang from a pull-up bar with palms facing away.
Pull the chest toward the bar by driving the elbows down.
Lower in 2–3 seconds to a dead hang.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Squat
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat down keeping the chest up and knees tracking over the toes.
Stand back up driving through the mid-foot.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Walking Lunge
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor.
Drive up and step the back foot through into the next lunge; alternate sides.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Step-Up
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand in front of a step or low box.
Step up driving through the front foot until standing on top.
Step down under control and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Ruck Walk
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and walk briskly on flat ground or a moderate incline.
Maintain an upright posture and a controlled cadence.
Continue for the prescribed time gradually increasing distance over weeks.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Burpee
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Drop to a push-up position, perform one push-up, jump the feet to the hands and explode up into a small jump.
Land softly and immediately repeat.

exercises.name: Plyometric Push-Up
instructions: Set up in a high plank with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the chest, then explosively press up so the hands leave the floor.
Land softly with elbows soft and immediately lower into the next rep.

exercises.name: Clap Push-Up
instructions: Set up in a high plank with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the chest and press up explosively clapping the hands together at the top.
Land softly with elbows soft and continue.

exercises.name: Burpee with Jump
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Drop to a push-up position, perform one push-up, jump the feet to the hands and explode up into a vertical jump.
Land softly and immediately repeat.

exercises.name: Squat Jump
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat to parallel and explode up into a vertical jump swinging the arms.
Land softly bending the knees and immediately repeat.

exercises.name: Split Squat Jump
instructions: Step into a split stance with one foot forward and one back.
Lower into a lunge and explode up switching legs in mid-air.
Land softly in the opposite split stance and repeat.

exercises.name: Skater Jump
instructions: Stand on one leg with the other crossed slightly behind.
Push off laterally to the opposite side landing softly on the other leg with the trailing leg crossed behind.
Continue alternating side to side.

exercises.name: Explosive Mountain Climbers
instructions: Set up in a high plank with hands under shoulders.
Drive one knee toward the chest and switch legs explosively in mid-air.
Continue at a fast pace keeping the hips low.

exercises.name: Plank Jack
instructions: Set up in a high plank with feet together.
Jump the feet wide out to the sides and immediately back together.
Continue at a steady pace keeping the hips level.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Snatch

restrictions.note: Reduce load and amplitude until symptoms resolve.

instructions: Start with the kettlebell on the floor between the feet.
Hinge, explosively drive the hips forward and pull the kettlebell straight overhead in one continuous motion punching the hand through at the top.
Lower under control to the floor and switch hands as scheduled.

exercises.name: Double Kettlebell Clean
instructions: Stand with two kettlebells on the floor between the feet.
Hinge, grip both bells and drive the hips forward to clean both kettlebells to a double rack at the shoulders.
Lower under control to the floor and repeat.

exercises.name: Double Kettlebell Press
instructions: Start with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders, elbows tucked.
Press both kettlebells overhead until the arms are fully extended.
Lower in 2–3 seconds back to the rack.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Snatch
instructions: Start with a dumbbell between the feet and hinge to grip it with one hand.
Drive the hips forward explosively pulling the dumbbell straight overhead in one motion.
Lower to the floor under control and complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Thruster
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand racked at the shoulders.
Squat down to parallel keeping the chest up.
Drive up explosively and press the dumbbells overhead in one motion.

exercises.name: Barbell Push Press
instructions: Stand with the barbell racked at the shoulders, hands just outside shoulder width.
Dip slightly at the knees and explosively drive up pressing the bar overhead.
Lower in 2–3 seconds back to the front rack.

exercises.name: Barbell Hang Clean

restrictions.note: Avoid the dynamic catch and reduce load while symptoms are present.

instructions: Stand with the barbell at hip level, hands shoulder-width apart.
Hinge to mid-thigh, explode up driving the hips and pull the bar to a front rack at the shoulders, dropping under to receive it.
Stand fully and lower the bar to the start under control.

box_jump_v1.name: Salt al calaix
instructions: Dret a un peu d'un calaix sòlid amb peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Balanceja els braços enrere, fes un breu hinge i salta explosiu aterrant suau a sobre del calaix amb genolls flexionats.
Baixa caminant (no saltis avall) per la repetició següent.

step_up_jump_v1.name: Step-up amb salt
instructions: Posa un peu en un calaix baix, empeny i salta explosivament a l'aire.
Aterra suau de nou amb el mateix peu al calaix.
Baixa i alterna costats.

depth_drop_jump_v1.name: Depth jump
instructions: Dret sobre un calaix d'altura moderada (30–60 cm).
Surt del calaix i tan bon punt aterres, rebota immediatament en un salt vertical màxim.
Aterra suau i reseteja abans del següent.

box_squat_jump_v1.name: Squat jump des de calaix
instructions: Asseu-te en un calaix baix amb peus plans i tronc dret.
Empeny pels peus i salta explosiu del calaix.
Aterra suau, torna a seure breument i repeteix.

lateral_box_jump_v1.name: Salt lateral al calaix
instructions: Dret de costat al costat d'un calaix baix.
Flexiona els genolls i salta lateralment al calaix aterrant suau.
Baixa al costat oposat i salta de tornada; alterna.

seated_box_jump_v1.name: Salt al calaix des de assegut
instructions: Asseu-te en un calaix baix amb peus plans i braços als costats, sense moviment previ.
Sense balanceig, explota recte amunt saltant a un calaix objectiu davant.
Baixa i reseteja entre reps.

broad_jump_v1.name: Salt horitzontal
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada del maluc, balanceja els braços enrere i flexiona els genolls.
Empeny els braços endavant i salta el màxim horitzontalment possible.
Aterra suau amb genolls flexionats; reseteja.

tuck_jump_v1.name: Tuck jump
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada del maluc i braços als costats.
Salta explosiu portant els genolls al pit a dalt.
Aterra suau flexionant els genolls i repeteix.

single_leg_box_jump_v1.name: Salt al calaix a una cama
instructions: Dret sobre una cama de cara a un calaix baix.
Flexiona el genoll i salta explosiu al calaix aterrant suau a la mateixa cama.
Baixa i fes les reps abans de canviar.

bound_alternating_v1.name: Bounds alternants
instructions: Corre uns passos per agafar ritme.
Empeny d'una cama i salta endavant i lleugerament amunt aterrant a la cama oposada.
Continua alternant pels bounds prescrits buscant distància horitzontal.

sandbag_clean_v1.name: Clean amb sandbag
instructions: Dret amb el sandbag entre els peus i agafa les nanses o el sac.
Hinge i explota amunt empenyent els malucs, tirant el sandbag al pit en posició rack.
Baixa al terra controlat i repeteix.

sandbag_squat_v1.name: Front squat amb sandbag
instructions: Sostén un sandbag racked al pit amb els dos braços.
Fes la sentadella mantenint el pit alt i els colzes amunt.
Aixeca't empenyent pel mig del peu.

sandbag_bear_hug_carry_v1.name: Carry abraçant sandbag
instructions: Recull el sandbag i abraça'l fort al pit, braços al voltant.
Camina endavant amb passos controlats per la distància o temps prescrits.
Deixa'l amb una flexió de malucs.

sandbag_shoulder_to_shoulder_v1.name: Sandbag d'espatlla a espatlla
instructions: Racked un sandbag a una espatlla amb les dues mans.
Empeny explosiu amunt i baixa a l'espatlla oposada.
Alterna espatlles per les reps.

sandbag_zercher_squat_v1.name: Zercher squat amb sandbag
instructions: Sostén un sandbag a l'angle dels colzes a l'altura del pit.
Fes la sentadella mantenint el pit alt i colzes plegats.
Aixeca't empenyent pel mig del peu.

sandbag_rotational_lunge_v1.name: Llunja rotacional amb sandbag
instructions: Sostén un sandbag a l'altura del pit i avança a una llunja.
Rota el tronc cap a la cama davantera sense perdre l'equilibri.
Torna a dret i alterna costats.

sandbag_get_up_v1.name: Get-up amb sandbag
instructions: Estira't d'esquena abraçant el sandbag al pit.
Asseu-te, recolza una mà al terra i posa't dret controlat.
Inverteix la seqüència fins al terra; alterna costats.

sandbag_drag_v1.name: Arrossegar sandbag
instructions: Lliga una corretja o agafa el sandbag i camina enrere arrossegant-lo per superfície llisa.
Mantingues una lleugera inclinació endavant i el core actiu.
Continua per la distància o temps prescrits.

weighted_vest_pushup_v1.name: Flexió amb armilla llastrada
instructions: Posa't l'armilla llastrada i prepara una planxa alta amb mans a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Baixa el pit al terra en 2 segons amb els colzes a uns 45°.
Empeny per tornar sense deixar caure els malucs.

weighted_vest_pullup_v1.name: Dominada amb armilla llastrada
instructions: Posa't l'armilla i penja't d'una barra de dominades amb palmells endavant.
Tira el pit cap a la barra empenyent els colzes avall.
Baixa en 2–3 segons fins a suspensió morta.

weighted_vest_squat_v1.name: Sentadella amb armilla llastrada
instructions: Posa't l'armilla i dret amb peus a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Fes la sentadella mantenint el pit alt i els genolls seguint els dits.
Aixeca't empenyent pel mig del peu.

weighted_vest_lunge_walk_v1.name: Llunja caminada amb armilla
instructions: Posa't l'armilla i dret amb peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Avança a una llunja baixant el genoll del darrere cap al terra.
Empeny i passa el peu del darrere a la llunja següent; alterna.

weighted_vest_step_up_v1.name: Step-up amb armilla
instructions: Posa't l'armilla i dret davant d'un step o calaix baix.
Puja empenyent pel peu davanter fins quedar dret a sobre.
Baixa controlat i alterna costats.

weighted_vest_ruck_walk_v1.name: Ruck walking amb armilla
instructions: Posa't l'armilla i camina ràpid en pla o pendent moderat.
Mantingues postura dreta i cadència controlada.
Continua pel temps prescrit augmentant gradualment la distància.

weighted_vest_burpee_v1.name: Burpee amb armilla
instructions: Posa't l'armilla i dret amb peus a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Baixa a planxa, fes una flexió, salta els peus a les mans i explota a un petit salt.
Aterra suau i repeteix.

plyo_pushup_v1.name: Flexió pliomètrica
instructions: Planxa alta amb mans a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Baixa el pit i empeny explosiu perquè les mans surtin del terra.
Aterra suau amb colzes flexibles i baixa a la repetició següent.

clap_pushup_v1.name: Flexió amb aplaudiment
instructions: Planxa alta amb mans a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Baixa el pit i empeny explosiu picant les mans a dalt.
Aterra suau amb colzes flexibles i continua.

burpee_jump_v1.name: Burpee amb salt
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Baixa a planxa, fes una flexió, salta els peus a les mans i explota a un salt vertical.
Aterra suau i repeteix.

squat_jump_v1.name: Squat jump
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Sentadella a paral·lel i explota amunt en salt vertical balancejant els braços.
Aterra suau amb genolls flexionats i repeteix.

split_squat_jump_v1.name: Split squat jump
instructions: Posició de split amb un peu davant i l'altre darrere.
Baixa a llunja i salta explosiu canviant cames a l'aire.
Aterra suau a la posició de split oposada i repeteix.

skater_jump_v1.name: Salt patinador
instructions: Dret sobre una cama amb l'altra creuada lleugerament darrere.
Empeny lateralment al costat oposat aterrant suau a l'altra cama amb la cama de seguiment darrere.
Continua alternant costat a costat.

mountain_climber_explosive_v1.name: Mountain climbers explosius
instructions: Planxa alta amb mans sota espatlles.
Porta un genoll cap al pit i canvia cames explosiu a l'aire.
Continua a ritme ràpid amb malucs baixos.

plank_jack_v1.name: Plank jacks
instructions: Planxa alta amb peus junts.
Salta els peus oberts als costats i immediatament junts.
Continua a ritme constant amb malucs anivellats.

kb_snatch_v1.name: Snatch amb kettlebell
instructions: Comença amb la kettlebell al terra entre els peus.
Hinge, empeny explosiu els malucs i tira la kettlebell recta amunt en un sol moviment travessant la mà a dalt.
Baixa controlat al terra i canvia mans segons la programació.

kb_double_clean_v1.name: Doble clean amb kettlebells
instructions: Dret amb dues kettlebells al terra entre els peus.
Hinge, agafa les dues i empeny els malucs per cleanejar les dues a doble rack a les espatlles.
Baixa controlat al terra i repeteix.

kb_double_press_v1.name: Doble press amb kettlebells
instructions: Comença amb dues kettlebells racked a les espatlles, colzes plegats.
Empeny les dues amunt fins extensió completa.
Baixa en 2–3 segons al rack.

db_snatch_v1.name: Snatch amb manuella
instructions: Comença amb una manuella entre els peus i hinge per agafar-la amb una mà.
Empeny els malucs explosiu tirant la manuella recta amunt en un sol moviment.
Baixa controlat al terra i fes les reps abans de canviar.

db_thruster_v1.name: Thruster amb manuelles
instructions: Dret amb una manuella a cada mà racked a les espatlles.
Sentadella a paral·lel mantenint el pit alt.
Empeny amunt explosiu i pressiona les manuelles sobre el cap en un sol moviment.

push_press_v1.name: Push press amb barra
instructions: Dret amb la barra racked a les espatlles, mans just per fora de l'espatlla.
Lleuger dip de genolls i empeny explosiu pressionant la barra sobre el cap.
Baixa en 2–3 segons al rack frontal.

hang_clean_v1.name: Hang clean amb barra
instructions: Dret amb la barra a l'altura del maluc, mans a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Hinge a mig-cuixa, explota empenyent els malucs i porta la barra a rack frontal a les espatlles, baixant per recollir-la.
Aixeca't del tot i baixa la barra a l'inici controlat.

box_jump_v1.name: Salto al cajón
instructions: De pie a un pie de un cajón sólido con pies al ancho de cadera.
Balancea los brazos atrás, haz un breve hinge y salta explosivo aterrizando suave sobre el cajón con rodillas flexionadas.
Baja caminando (no saltes hacia abajo) para la siguiente repetición.

step_up_jump_v1.name: Step-up con salto
instructions: Coloca un pie en un cajón bajo, empuja y salta explosivamente al aire.
Aterriza suave con el mismo pie en el cajón.
Baja y alterna lados.

depth_drop_jump_v1.name: Depth jump
instructions: De pie sobre un cajón de altura moderada (30–60 cm).
Sal del cajón y en cuanto aterrices, rebota inmediatamente en un salto vertical máximo.
Aterriza suave y resetea antes del siguiente.

box_squat_jump_v1.name: Squat jump desde cajón
instructions: Siéntate en un cajón bajo con pies planos y torso erguido.
Empuja por los pies y salta explosivo del cajón.
Aterriza suave, vuelve a sentarte brevemente y repite.

lateral_box_jump_v1.name: Salto lateral al cajón
instructions: De pie de lado junto a un cajón bajo.
Flexiona las rodillas y salta lateralmente al cajón aterrizando suave.
Baja al lado opuesto y salta de vuelta; alterna.

seated_box_jump_v1.name: Salto al cajón sentado
instructions: Siéntate en un cajón bajo con pies planos y brazos a los lados, sin movimiento previo.
Sin balanceo, explota recto arriba saltando a un cajón objetivo delante.
Baja y resetea entre reps.

broad_jump_v1.name: Salto horizontal
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de cadera, balancea los brazos atrás y flexiona las rodillas.
Empuja los brazos adelante y salta lo máximo horizontalmente.
Aterriza suave con rodillas flexionadas; resetea.

tuck_jump_v1.name: Tuck jump
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de cadera y brazos a los lados.
Salta explosivo llevando las rodillas al pecho arriba.
Aterriza suave flexionando las rodillas y repite.

single_leg_box_jump_v1.name: Salto al cajón a una pierna
instructions: De pie sobre una pierna de cara a un cajón bajo.
Flexiona la rodilla y salta explosivo al cajón aterrizando suave en la misma pierna.
Baja y haz las reps antes de cambiar.

bound_alternating_v1.name: Bounds alternados
instructions: Corre unos pasos para coger ritmo.
Empuja de una pierna y salta adelante y ligeramente arriba aterrizando en la pierna opuesta.
Continúa alternando los bounds buscando distancia horizontal.

sandbag_clean_v1.name: Clean con sandbag
instructions: De pie con el sandbag entre los pies y agarra las asas o el saco.
Hinge y explota arriba empujando las caderas, tirando el sandbag al pecho en posición rack.
Baja al suelo controlado y repite.

sandbag_squat_v1.name: Front squat con sandbag
instructions: Sostén un sandbag racked en el pecho con ambos brazos.
Haz la sentadilla manteniendo el pecho alto y los codos arriba.
Levántate empujando por la planta del pie.

sandbag_bear_hug_carry_v1.name: Carry abrazando sandbag
instructions: Recoge el sandbag y abrázalo fuerte al pecho, brazos alrededor.
Camina adelante con pasos controlados por la distancia o tiempo prescritos.
Déjalo con una flexión de caderas.

sandbag_shoulder_to_shoulder_v1.name: Sandbag de hombro a hombro
instructions: Racked un sandbag en un hombro con ambas manos.
Empuja explosivo arriba y baja al hombro opuesto.
Alterna hombros las reps.

sandbag_zercher_squat_v1.name: Zercher squat con sandbag
instructions: Sostén un sandbag en el ángulo de los codos a la altura del pecho.
Haz la sentadilla manteniendo el pecho alto y codos pegados.
Levántate empujando por la planta del pie.

sandbag_rotational_lunge_v1.name: Zancada rotacional con sandbag
instructions: Sostén un sandbag a la altura del pecho y avanza a una zancada.
Rota el torso hacia la pierna delantera sin perder el equilibrio.
Vuelve a de pie y alterna lados.

sandbag_get_up_v1.name: Get-up con sandbag
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas abrazando el sandbag al pecho.
Siéntate, apoya una mano en el suelo y ponte de pie controlado.
Invierte la secuencia hasta el suelo; alterna lados.

sandbag_drag_v1.name: Arrastrar sandbag
instructions: Ata una correa o agarra el sandbag y camina hacia atrás arrastrándolo por superficie lisa.
Mantén una ligera inclinación adelante y el core activo.
Continúa por la distancia o tiempo prescritos.

weighted_vest_pushup_v1.name: Flexión con chaleco lastrado
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y prepara una plancha alta con manos al ancho de hombros.
Baja el pecho al suelo en 2 segundos con los codos a unos 45°.
Empuja para volver sin dejar caer las caderas.

weighted_vest_pullup_v1.name: Dominada con chaleco
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y cuélgate de una barra con palmas hacia adelante.
Tira del pecho hacia la barra empujando los codos abajo.
Baja en 2–3 segundos a suspensión muerta.

weighted_vest_squat_v1.name: Sentadilla con chaleco
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y de pie con pies al ancho de hombros.
Haz la sentadilla manteniendo el pecho alto y rodillas siguiendo los dedos.
Levántate empujando por la planta del pie.

weighted_vest_lunge_walk_v1.name: Zancada caminada con chaleco
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y de pie con pies al ancho de cadera.
Avanza a una zancada bajando la rodilla trasera al suelo.
Empuja y pasa el pie trasero a la siguiente zancada; alterna.

weighted_vest_step_up_v1.name: Step-up con chaleco
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y de pie ante un step o cajón bajo.
Sube empujando por el pie delantero hasta quedar de pie arriba.
Baja controlado y alterna lados.

weighted_vest_ruck_walk_v1.name: Ruck walking con chaleco
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y camina rápido en plano o pendiente moderada.
Mantén postura erguida y cadencia controlada.
Continúa el tiempo prescrito aumentando gradualmente la distancia.

weighted_vest_burpee_v1.name: Burpee con chaleco
instructions: Ponte el chaleco y de pie con pies al ancho de hombros.
Baja a plancha, haz una flexión, salta los pies a las manos y explota a un pequeño salto.
Aterriza suave y repite.

plyo_pushup_v1.name: Flexión pliométrica
instructions: Plancha alta con manos al ancho de hombros.
Baja el pecho y empuja explosivo para que las manos salgan del suelo.
Aterriza suave con codos flexibles y baja a la siguiente repetición.

clap_pushup_v1.name: Flexión con aplauso
instructions: Plancha alta con manos al ancho de hombros.
Baja el pecho y empuja explosivo dando una palmada arriba.
Aterriza suave con codos flexibles y continúa.

burpee_jump_v1.name: Burpee con salto
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de hombros.
Baja a plancha, haz una flexión, salta los pies a las manos y explota a un salto vertical.
Aterriza suave y repite.

squat_jump_v1.name: Squat jump
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de hombros.
Sentadilla a paralelo y explota arriba en salto vertical balanceando los brazos.
Aterriza suave con rodillas flexionadas y repite.

split_squat_jump_v1.name: Split squat jump
instructions: Posición de split con un pie delante y otro detrás.
Baja a zancada y salta explosivo cambiando piernas en el aire.
Aterriza suave en la posición de split opuesta y repite.

skater_jump_v1.name: Salto patinador
instructions: De pie sobre una pierna con la otra cruzada ligeramente atrás.
Empuja lateralmente al lado opuesto aterrizando suave en la otra pierna con la pierna de seguimiento detrás.
Continúa alternando lado a lado.

mountain_climber_explosive_v1.name: Mountain climbers explosivos
instructions: Plancha alta con manos bajo hombros.
Lleva una rodilla al pecho y cambia piernas explosivo en el aire.
Continúa a ritmo rápido con caderas bajas.

plank_jack_v1.name: Plank jacks
instructions: Plancha alta con pies juntos.
Salta los pies abiertos a los lados e inmediatamente juntos.
Continúa a ritmo constante con caderas niveladas.

kb_snatch_v1.name: Snatch con kettlebell
instructions: Empieza con la kettlebell en el suelo entre los pies.
Hinge, empuja explosivo las caderas y tira la kettlebell recta arriba en un solo movimiento atravesando la mano arriba.
Baja controlado al suelo y cambia manos según programación.

kb_double_clean_v1.name: Doble clean con kettlebells
instructions: De pie con dos kettlebells en el suelo entre los pies.
Hinge, agarra ambas y empuja las caderas para clean ambas a doble rack en hombros.
Baja controlado al suelo y repite.

kb_double_press_v1.name: Doble press con kettlebells
instructions: Empieza con dos kettlebells racked en hombros, codos pegados.
Empuja ambas arriba hasta extensión completa.
Baja en 2–3 segundos al rack.

db_snatch_v1.name: Snatch con mancuerna
instructions: Empieza con una mancuerna entre los pies y hinge para agarrarla con una mano.
Empuja las caderas explosivo tirando la mancuerna recta arriba en un solo movimiento.
Baja controlado al suelo y haz las reps antes de cambiar.

db_thruster_v1.name: Thruster con mancuernas
instructions: De pie con una mancuerna en cada mano racked en hombros.
Sentadilla a paralelo manteniendo el pecho alto.
Empuja arriba explosivo y presiona las mancuernas sobre la cabeza en un solo movimiento.

push_press_v1.name: Push press con barra
instructions: De pie con la barra racked en hombros, manos justo por fuera del hombro.
Ligero dip de rodillas y empuja explosivo presionando la barra sobre la cabeza.
Baja en 2–3 segundos al rack frontal.

hang_clean_v1.name: Hang clean con barra
instructions: De pie con la barra a la altura de la cadera, manos al ancho de hombros.
Hinge a medio-muslo, explota empujando las caderas y lleva la barra a rack frontal en hombros, bajando para recibirla.
Levántate del todo y baja la barra al inicio controlado.

box_jump_v1.name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand a foot away from a sturdy box with feet hip-width apart.
Swing the arms back, hinge briefly and jump explosively landing softly on top of the box with knees bent.
Step down (do not jump down) to start the next rep.

step_up_jump_v1.name: Step-Up to Jump
instructions: Place one foot on a low box, drive through it to step up explosively jumping into the air.
Land softly back on the same foot on the box.
Step down and alternate sides.

depth_drop_jump_v1.name: Depth Jump
instructions: Stand on top of a box of moderate height (30–60 cm).
Step off the box and as soon as you land, rebound immediately into a maximal vertical jump.
Land softly and reset before the next rep.

box_squat_jump_v1.name: Box Squat Jump
instructions: Sit on a low box with feet flat and torso upright.
Drive through the feet jumping explosively up off the box.
Land softly, sit back down briefly and repeat.

lateral_box_jump_v1.name: Lateral Box Jump
instructions: Stand sideways next to a low box.
Bend the knees and jump laterally onto the box landing softly.
Step down to the opposite side and jump back across; alternate.

seated_box_jump_v1.name: Seated Box Jump
instructions: Sit on a low box with feet flat and arms by the sides, stationary.
Without rocking, explode straight up jumping onto a target box in front.
Step down and reset between reps.

broad_jump_v1.name: Broad Jump
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, swing the arms back and bend the knees.
Drive the arms forward and jump as far horizontally as possible.
Land softly with knees bent; reset before the next rep.

tuck_jump_v1.name: Tuck Jump
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart and arms at the sides.
Jump explosively bringing the knees toward the chest at the top.
Land softly bending the knees and immediately repeat.

single_leg_box_jump_v1.name: Single-Leg Box Jump
instructions: Stand on one leg facing a low box.
Bend the knee and jump explosively up onto the box landing softly on the same leg.
Step down and complete reps before switching sides.

bound_alternating_v1.name: Alternating Bounds
instructions: Run a few steps to gain rhythm.
Push off one leg and jump forward and slightly up landing on the opposite leg.
Continue alternating for the prescribed bounds focusing on horizontal distance.

sandbag_clean_v1.name: Sandbag Clean
instructions: Stand with the sandbag between the feet and grip the handles or the bag itself.
Hinge and explode up driving the hips forward, pulling the sandbag to the chest in a rack position.
Lower the sandbag to the floor under control and repeat.

sandbag_squat_v1.name: Sandbag Front Squat
instructions: Hold a sandbag racked against the chest with both arms.
Squat down keeping the chest tall and elbows up.
Stand back up driving through the mid-foot.

sandbag_bear_hug_carry_v1.name: Bear Hug Sandbag Carry
instructions: Pick up the sandbag and hug it tight against the chest, arms wrapped around it.
Walk forward with controlled steps for the prescribed distance or time.
Set the sandbag down with a hip hinge.

sandbag_shoulder_to_shoulder_v1.name: Sandbag Shoulder to Shoulder
instructions: Rack a sandbag on one shoulder with both hands supporting it.
Explosively press it overhead and lower to the opposite shoulder.
Alternate shoulders for the prescribed reps.

sandbag_zercher_squat_v1.name: Sandbag Zercher Squat
instructions: Hold a sandbag in the crook of the elbows at chest height.
Squat down keeping the chest up and elbows tucked.
Stand back up driving through the mid-foot.

sandbag_rotational_lunge_v1.name: Sandbag Rotational Lunge
instructions: Hold a sandbag at chest height and step forward into a lunge.
Rotate the torso toward the front leg without losing balance.
Return to standing and alternate sides.

sandbag_get_up_v1.name: Sandbag Get-Up
instructions: Lie on the back hugging a sandbag to the chest.
Sit up, post a hand on the floor and stand up under control.
Reverse the sequence back to the floor; alternate sides.

sandbag_drag_v1.name: Sandbag Drag
instructions: Loop a strap or grip the sandbag and walk backward dragging it on a smooth surface.
Maintain a slight forward lean and brace the core.
Continue for the prescribed distance or time.

weighted_vest_pushup_v1.name: Weight Vest Push-Up
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and set up in a high plank with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the chest to the floor in 2 seconds keeping the elbows tucked at ~45°.
Press back up to the start without sagging the hips.

weighted_vest_pullup_v1.name: Weight Vest Pull-Up
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and hang from a pull-up bar with palms facing away.
Pull the chest toward the bar by driving the elbows down.
Lower in 2–3 seconds to a dead hang.

weighted_vest_squat_v1.name: Weight Vest Squat
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat down keeping the chest up and knees tracking over the toes.
Stand back up driving through the mid-foot.

weighted_vest_lunge_walk_v1.name: Weight Vest Walking Lunge
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor.
Drive up and step the back foot through into the next lunge; alternate sides.

weighted_vest_step_up_v1.name: Weight Vest Step-Up
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand in front of a step or low box.
Step up driving through the front foot until standing on top.
Step down under control and alternate sides.

weighted_vest_ruck_walk_v1.name: Weight Vest Ruck Walk
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and walk briskly on flat ground or a moderate incline.
Maintain an upright posture and a controlled cadence.
Continue for the prescribed time gradually increasing distance over weeks.

weighted_vest_burpee_v1.name: Weight Vest Burpee
instructions: Wear a weighted vest and stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Drop to a push-up position, perform one push-up, jump the feet to the hands and explode up into a small jump.
Land softly and immediately repeat.

plyo_pushup_v1.name: Plyometric Push-Up
instructions: Set up in a high plank with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the chest, then explosively press up so the hands leave the floor.
Land softly with elbows soft and immediately lower into the next rep.

clap_pushup_v1.name: Clap Push-Up
instructions: Set up in a high plank with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the chest and press up explosively clapping the hands together at the top.
Land softly with elbows soft and continue.

burpee_jump_v1.name: Burpee with Jump
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Drop to a push-up position, perform one push-up, jump the feet to the hands and explode up into a vertical jump.
Land softly and immediately repeat.

squat_jump_v1.name: Squat Jump
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat to parallel and explode up into a vertical jump swinging the arms.
Land softly bending the knees and immediately repeat.

split_squat_jump_v1.name: Split Squat Jump
instructions: Step into a split stance with one foot forward and one back.
Lower into a lunge and explode up switching legs in mid-air.
Land softly in the opposite split stance and repeat.

skater_jump_v1.name: Skater Jump
instructions: Stand on one leg with the other crossed slightly behind.
Push off laterally to the opposite side landing softly on the other leg with the trailing leg crossed behind.
Continue alternating side to side.

mountain_climber_explosive_v1.name: Explosive Mountain Climbers
instructions: Set up in a high plank with hands under shoulders.
Drive one knee toward the chest and switch legs explosively in mid-air.
Continue at a fast pace keeping the hips low.

plank_jack_v1.name: Plank Jack
instructions: Set up in a high plank with feet together.
Jump the feet wide out to the sides and immediately back together.
Continue at a steady pace keeping the hips level.

kb_snatch_v1.name: Kettlebell Snatch
instructions: Start with the kettlebell on the floor between the feet.
Hinge, explosively drive the hips forward and pull the kettlebell straight overhead in one continuous motion punching the hand through at the top.
Lower under control to the floor and switch hands as scheduled.

kb_double_clean_v1.name: Double Kettlebell Clean
instructions: Stand with two kettlebells on the floor between the feet.
Hinge, grip both bells and drive the hips forward to clean both kettlebells to a double rack at the shoulders.
Lower under control to the floor and repeat.

kb_double_press_v1.name: Double Kettlebell Press
instructions: Start with two kettlebells racked at the shoulders, elbows tucked.
Press both kettlebells overhead until the arms are fully extended.
Lower in 2–3 seconds back to the rack.

db_snatch_v1.name: Dumbbell Snatch
instructions: Start with a dumbbell between the feet and hinge to grip it with one hand.
Drive the hips forward explosively pulling the dumbbell straight overhead in one motion.
Lower to the floor under control and complete reps before switching sides.

db_thruster_v1.name: Dumbbell Thruster
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand racked at the shoulders.
Squat down to parallel keeping the chest up.
Drive up explosively and press the dumbbells overhead in one motion.

push_press_v1.name: Barbell Push Press
instructions: Stand with the barbell racked at the shoulders, hands just outside shoulder width.
Dip slightly at the knees and explosively drive up pressing the bar overhead.
Lower in 2–3 seconds back to the front rack.

hang_clean_v1.name: Barbell Hang Clean
instructions: Stand with the barbell at hip level, hands shoulder-width apart.
Hinge to mid-thigh, explode up driving the hips and pull the bar to a front rack at the shoulders, dropping under to receive it.
Stand fully and lower the bar to the start under control.
